name: Ralph Story
description: Execute one Ralph story in a fresh context, then persist progress for the next iteration.

fields.name: workflow_id
fields.description: PRD/RLOOP workflow id whose prd.json owns this story

steps.name: select
steps.prompt:
Read `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/prd.json` and `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/progress.txt`.

If `story_id` is set, select that story. Otherwise select the first highest-priority story where `passes` is false and dependencies are satisfied. Write the selected story details and planned files to `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/stories/{{ id }}.md`.

Do not start broad work. This ticket is responsible for exactly one story.

steps.name: implement
steps.prompt:
Implement only the selected story recorded in `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/stories/{{ id }}.md`.

Use fresh context discipline: read the PRD, progress file, selected story, and relevant repo files. Avoid opportunistic adjacent work. If the story is blocked or too large, stop and document the blocker instead of widening scope.

steps.name: verify
steps.prompt:
Verify the story is actually complete.

Run the quality commands from `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/prd.json` and `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/progress.txt` when present. Add or update tests where the story changes behavior. Record evidence in `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/stories/{{ id }}.md`.

Fix failures before proceeding.

on_reject.prompt:
Story verification was rejected: {{ rejection_reason }}

Return to the implementation, fix the issue, and rerun the quality checks.

steps.name: learn
steps.prompt:
Persist memory for the next fresh context.

Update `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/progress.txt` with what changed, quality evidence, important files, surprises, and any reusable repo knowledge. If the repo has `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, or similar guidance files and you learned stable reusable instructions, update them conservatively.

steps.name: commit
steps.prompt:
Finalize this one-story iteration.

Update `.tickets/workflows/{{ workflow_id }}/prd.json` so the selected story has `passes: true`, a concise result note, and validation evidence. Commit focused changes if this repo uses commits for agent progress. Do not mark unrelated stories complete.
